'''âj-p-r''' ('''japara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tippytoe|tippytoe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tippytoe|tippytoe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-p-r
|-
! Lemma
| japara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:japarithi|japarithi]] || [[word:japariji|japariji]] || [[word:japarishi|japarishi]] || [[word:japari|japari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:japaruthuth|japaruthuth]] || [[word:japarujuj|japarujuj]] || [[word:japarushush|japarushush]] || [[word:japar|japar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:japaruthu|japaruthu]] || [[word:japaruju|japaruju]] || [[word:japarushu|japarushu]] || [[word:japaru|japaru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:japarufuth|japarufuth]] || [[word:japarufuj|japarufuj]] || [[word:japarufush|japarufush]] || [[word:japaruf|japaruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:japarethe|japarethe]] || [[word:japareje|japareje]] || [[word:japareshe|japareshe]] || [[word:japare|japare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:japarothoth|japarothoth]] || [[word:japarojoj|japarojoj]] || [[word:japaroshosh|japaroshosh]] || [[word:japar|japar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:japarotho|japarotho]] || [[word:japarojo|japarojo]] || [[word:japarosho|japarosho]] || [[word:japaro|japaro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:japarofoth|japarofoth]] || [[word:japarofoj|japarofoj]] || [[word:japarofosh|japarofosh]] || [[word:japarof|japarof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:japarĂŠthĂŠ|japarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:japarĂŠjĂŠ|japarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:japarĂŠshĂŠ|japarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:japarĂŠ|japarĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:japarathath|japarathath]] || [[word:japarajaj|japarajaj]] || [[word:japarashash|japarashash]] || [[word:japar|japar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:japaratha|japaratha]] || [[word:japaraja|japaraja]] || [[word:japarasha|japarasha]] || [[word:japara|japara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:japarafath|japarafath]] || [[word:japarafaj|japarafaj]] || [[word:japarafash|japarafash]] || [[word:japaraf|japaraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:japarasha|japarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojaparasha|gojaparasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijaparasha|gokijaparasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:japarnĂŒsha|japarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojaparnknĂŒsha|gojaparnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijaparnĂŒsha|gokijaparnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:japarshĂ«sha|japarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojaparnkshĂ«sha|gojaparnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijaparshĂ«sha|gokijaparshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:japarosha|japarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojaparnkrosha|gojaparnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijaparosha|gokijaparosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:japarmusha|japarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojaparnkmusha|gojaparnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijaparmusha|gokijaparmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:japarsherasha|japarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojaparnksherasha|gojaparnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijaparsherasha|gokijaparsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:japarngasha|japarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojaparnkngasha|gojaparnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijaparngasha|gokijaparngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:japaryasha|japaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojaparnkyasha|gojaparnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijaparyasha|gokijaparyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:japaryamasha|japaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojaparnkyamasha|gojaparnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijaparyamasha|gokijaparyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:japarnĂŒshĂ«sha|japarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojaparnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gojaparnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijaparnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokijaparnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:japarnĂŒrosha|japarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojaparnknĂŒrosha|gojaparnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijaparnĂŒrosha|gokijaparnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:japarnĂŒmusha|japarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojaparnknĂŒmusha|gojaparnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijaparnĂŒmusha|gokijaparnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:japarshĂ«nĂŒsha|japarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojaparnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gojaparnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijaparshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokijaparshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:japarshĂ«rosha|japarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojaparnkshĂ«rosha|gojaparnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijaparshĂ«rosha|gokijaparshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:japarshĂ«musha|japarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojaparnkshĂ«musha|gojaparnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijaparshĂ«musha|gokijaparshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:japaronĂŒsha|japaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojaparnkronĂŒsha|gojaparnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijaparonĂŒsha|gokijaparonĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:japaroshĂ«sha|japaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojaparnkroshĂ«sha|gojaparnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijaparoshĂ«sha|gokijaparoshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:japaromusha|japaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojaparnkromusha|gojaparnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijaparomusha|gokijaparomusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:japarmunĂŒsha|japarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojaparnkmunĂŒsha|gojaparnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijaparmunĂŒsha|gokijaparmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:japarmushĂ«sha|japarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojaparnkmushĂ«sha|gojaparnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijaparmushĂ«sha|gokijaparmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:japarmurosha|japarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojaparnkmurosha|gojaparnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijaparmurosha|gokijaparmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:japar|japar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jĂŠpĂŠr|jĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojapar|hojapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojĂŠpĂŠr|hojĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojapar|hohojapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojĂŠpĂŠr|hohojĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒjapar|nĂŒjapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒjĂŠpĂŠr|nĂŒjĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjapar|nĂŒnĂŒjapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠpĂŠr|nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻjapar|nĂŻjapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻjĂŠpĂŠr|nĂŻjĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjapar|nĂŻnĂŻjapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠpĂŠr|nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujapar|lujapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujĂŠpĂŠr|lujĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujapar|lulujapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujĂŠpĂŠr|lulujĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijapar|lijapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijĂŠpĂŠr|lijĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijapar|lilijapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijĂŠpĂŠr|lilijĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojapar|kojapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojĂŠpĂŠr|kojĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojapar|kokojapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojĂŠpĂŠr|kokojĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejapar|kejapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejĂŠpĂŠr|kejĂŠpĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejapar|kekejapar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejĂŠpĂŠr|kekejĂŠpĂŠr]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
